title: podman play kube support for secrets
body:
/kind feature

**Description**

support secrets in podman play kube. We know that podman already supports some form of secrets. Our goal is to use podman play kube for creating the secrets and the pods (with references to the secrets) just as we do in k8s. Will podman support that? Can my team add this support?

comments.body: We have looked into this in the past, and have a hard time translating the two concepts, but I would be very interested in revisiting this.  @vrothberg @ashley-cui WDYT?
Closing this issue as it's a duplicate of https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10105#issuecomment-958936019, let's continue over there.
